steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The claim is that the narrator was frightened of the sailor. The quotation must show the narrator's own emotional response — not a physical description of the sailor or neutral facts.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'haunted dreams' and 'diabolical expressions': directly conveys the narrator's fear and emotional turmoil. ✓
  • Choice B: describes the sailor's arrival — factual, no emotional response shown. ✗
  • Choice C: describes the sailor's habits — factual, no emotional response shown. ✗
  • Choice D: describes the sailor's clothing — factual, no emotional response shown. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
